samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting.</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state">
            <enum_value id="S_IDLE">Idle state</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="S_COUNT">Counting state</enum_value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <description>State of the counter.</description>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <case_item id="reset">
                <condition>
                    <not>
                        <id ref="rst_n"/>
                    </not>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <id ref="out"/> = <value>4'b0000</value>;
                </action>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="count">
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <not>
                            <id ref="valid_count"/>
                        </not>
                        <id ref="out"/> == <value>4'd11</value>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <id ref="out"/> = <value>4'b0000</value>;
                </action>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="increment">
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <id ref="valid_count"/>
                        <not>
                            <id ref="out"/> == <value>4'd11</value>
                        </not>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <id ref="out"/> = <id ref="out"/> + <value>4'b0001</value>;
                </action>
            </case_item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
